title: Restraining Order / Legal Referral
content:
Restraining Order / Legal Referral


1. Restraining Order Jurisdiction Inquiry

“Can you look up if I can file a restraining order from another state?”

2. Legal Referral Strategy – NY to FL

“I think I should call some lawyers here in NY and ask for referrals / see if they know anyone in FL”

⸻

RECOMMENDED RESPONSE PATHS

I. Restraining Order Across State Lines

You should determine:
• Where the threat occurred: jurisdiction typically lies where the harassment, abuse, or threat happened.

Broward County

Signed sworn statement, gave to police,
